title: Tiruppaatrurai Adhimooleswarar Temple
tagline: Tiruppaatrurai Adhimooleswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tiruppaatrurai Adhimooleswarar Temple (திருப்பாற்றுறை ஆதிமூலேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva (Adhimooleswarar) located at Tirupattrurai in Trichy district of Ta
overview.description: Tiruppaatrurai Adhimooleswarar Temple (திருப்பாற்றுறை ஆதிமூலேசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva (Adhimooleswarar) located at Tirupattrurai in Trichy district of Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Tirupalathurai. The temple is revered in the 7th century Tamil Shaiva canon, the Tevaram, written by the Tamil Nayanar saint-poets and thus classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam. It has several inscriptions dating back to the Chola period.

topPlaces.name: Vengur
topPlaces.description: Vengur is a neighbourhood of the city of Tiruchirappalli in Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated in the heart of the city.

topPlaces.name: World War I Memorial Arch at Keezha Valadi
topPlaces.description: The World War I memorial arch, located at Keezha Valadi near Lalgudi in Tiruchi district, India, is a commemorative structure built during the British era to honor Indian soldiers who contributed to the Allied victory in World War I.

image.alt: World War I Memorial Arch at Keezha Valadi

topPlaces.name: Valadi
topPlaces.description: Valadi is a zone in Tiruchirappalli city, located on 5 miles from Chathram Bus Terminus in Trichy, Tamil Nadu along the Trichy-Chennai railway. There is a World War I memorial in Valadi on the Valadi Lalgudi highway.

topPlaces.name: Edayathumangalam Mangalyeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Mangalyeswarar Temple is a Shiva temple at Edayathumangalam, a neighbourhood situated at about 24 km from Tiruchirappalli in Tiruchirappalli district of Tamil Nadu state in India. The main deity in this temple is Mangalyeswarar and the goddess is Mangalambiga.

topPlaces.name: Pappankurichi
topPlaces.description: Pappakurichi is a neighbourhood of the city of Tiruchirappalli in Tamil Nadu, India. It was merged with the Tiruchirappalli Corporation in 2011.

topPlaces.name: Ellakudy
topPlaces.description: Ellakudy is a village in Tiruchirappalli taluk of Tiruchirappalli district, Tamil Nadu, India. It was merged with the Tiruchirappalli Corporation in 2011.

topPlaces.name: Arasangudy
topPlaces.description: Arasangudy is a village in Tiruchirappalli taluk of Tiruchirappalli district, Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Erumbeeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Erumbeeswarar Temple in Thiruverumbur, Tamil Nadu, India, is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva. Built on a 60-foot (18 m) tall hill, it is accessible via a flight of steps.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tiruppaatrurai Adhimooleswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tiruppaatrurai Adhimooleswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tiruppaatrurai Adhimooleswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (11 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (10 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tiruppaatrurai Adhimooleswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tiruppaatrurai Adhimooleswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tiruppaatrurai Adhimooleswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tiruppaatrurai Adhimooleswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tiruppaatrurai Adhimooleswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vengur, World War I Memorial Arch at Keezha Valadi, Valadi, Edayathumangalam Mangalyeswarar Temple, Pappankurichi.
